overview:
## Return Value

The value at the specified position.

## Discussion

When you create a noise map from a [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKNoise] object, GameplayKit performs the noise generation and processing computations necessary to fill a discrete grid with noise samples. (You specify the size of the grid and its number of samples in the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKNoiseMap/init(_:size:origin:sampleCount:seamless:)] initializer.) You can use this method to get noise values for arbitrary positions in the noise field, regardless of whether those positions are aligned with the discrete grid. When you query a position not aligned with the grid, this method automatically samples nearby grid positions and interpolates the results.

To query only positions within the discrete sample grid, use the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKNoiseMap/value(at:)] method instead.

# interpolatedValue(at:)

**Instance Method**

Returns the value at the specified position in the noise map, interpolating results for positions not on the discrete sample grid.

## Declaration

```swift
func interpolatedValue(at position: vector_float2) -> Float
```

## Parameters

- **position**: The position to query in the noise map. Must be within the rectangle defined by the noise map’s [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKNoiseMap/origin] and [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKNoiseMap/size] properties.

## Return Value

The value at the specified position.

## Discussion

When you create a noise map from a [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKNoise] object, GameplayKit performs the noise generation and processing computations necessary to fill a discrete grid with noise samples. (You specify the size of the grid and its number of samples in the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKNoiseMap/init(_:size:origin:sampleCount:seamless:)] initializer.) You can use this method to get noise values for arbitrary positions in the noise field, regardless of whether those positions are aligned with the discrete grid. When you query a position not aligned with the grid, this method automatically samples nearby grid positions and interpolates the results.

To query only positions within the discrete sample grid, use the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKNoiseMap/value(at:)] method instead.

## Accessing Noise Values

- **value(at:)**: Returns the value at the specified position in the noise map’s discrete sample grid.
- **setValue(_:at:)**: Sets the value at the specified position in the noise map.
